description: Renders an HTML page that stores the IdP callback result (full query string or whitelisted error code) in localStorage and redirects to /. The SPA picks up the pending result on load and completes the link via POST /api/oidc/link.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Authorization code from the OIDC provider

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State JWT from the authorize-link request

parameters.name: error
parameters.description: OAuth error code from the provider (whitelisted before storage)

200.description: HTML page that stores the callback result in localStorage and redirects to /
